subject: Scripts that convert + your mid-year lead checkup
previewText: The 'I didn't fill that out' response that closes deals + H1 performance audit

featuredArticle.title: How to Work Aged Leads: The Complete System for Maximum ROI
featuredArticle.spotlight: Stop overpaying for fresh leads when aged leads can deliver 10X better ROI. This complete system shows you the economics, scripts, and follow-up sequences that turn aged leads into your secret weapon.

quickTips: The 'I Didn't Fill That Out' Response Script
